events.text: {"decision":"fail","risk":"high","work_stage":"rough-complete","component_conditions":["installed-defective","non-compliant"],"percent_complete":85,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":0.9,"event_time":0,"rate":0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Missing secondary bonding jumper for separately derived system (SDS) transformer","No effective bonding path between transformer secondary grounded conductor and equipment grounding conductor/metal parts"],"actions":["Install required secondary bonding jumper per NEC 250.30","Verify grounding electrode conductor and bonding jumper sizing and connection","Coordinate inspection after correction"],"rationale":"A separately derived system requires a bonding jumper to connect the grounded conductor to equipment grounding conductor and metal enclosure; absence is a non-compliant defect creating shock/ground-fault hazard.","references":["NEC Art. 450","NEC 250.30"]}
